name: Hot Fudge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the flour, sugar, 2 tablespoons of baking cocoa, baking powder, and salt.
2. Stir in the milk and vanilla until smooth.
3. Spread the batter evenly in an ungreased 9-inch square baking pan.
4. Combine the brown sugar and the remaining baking cocoa; sprinkle over the batter.
5. Pour the hot water over everything, ensuring it covers the top of the batter.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35-40 minutes.
7. Serve warm. It is often enjoyed with frozen non-fat vanilla yogurt.
